groups.name: Project Scaffolding
groups.description: Next.js project setup, dependency installation, client singletons, environment configuration

tasks.title: Initialize Next.js 15 project with App Router and TypeScript
tasks.description: Create the Next.js project at projects/handofya/web/ with TypeScript strict mode, Tailwind CSS, PostCSS, ESLint, Prettier. Install core dependencies: next, react, react-dom, tailwindcss, postcss, autoprefixer, typescript, @types/react, @types/node, eslint, prettier. Create tsconfig.json with strict: true, next.config.ts, postcss.config.js, .gitignore (include node_modules, .next, .env.local), .env.local.example with all required env vars listed.
tasks.verification: cd projects/handofya/web && npm run build && npx tsc --noEmit

tasks.title: Configure Tailwind with placeholder brand tokens
tasks.description: Create tailwind.config.ts with extend block for colors (placeholder earthy palette: cream, taupe, warm-gray, accent), fontFamily (placeholder serif + sans-serif), borderRadius, and spacing. These will be updated when brand guidelines are finalized. Content paths should include ./src/**/*.{ts,tsx,mdx}.

tasks.title: Set up Supabase client singleton
tasks.description: Create lib/supabase.ts with getSupabaseClient() pattern copied from SecureClear. Create lib/supabase-server.ts with createServerClient() for use in API routes (uses SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY for admin operations). Install @supabase/supabase-js and @supabase/ssr.

tasks.title: Set up Sanity client and configuration
tasks.description: Install next-sanity, @sanity/image-url, @portabletext/react, sanity. Create sanity/config.ts with project ID, dataset, API version. Create lib/sanity.ts with sanityClient and sanityFetch<T>(query, params) helper. Create lib/sanity-image.ts with urlForImage() helper using @sanity/image-url. Configure next.config.ts to allow Sanity CDN image domains.

tasks.title: Set up Stripe server and client initialization
tasks.description: Install stripe (Node SDK), @stripe/stripe-js, @stripe/react-stripe-js. Create lib/stripe.ts with getStripeServer() singleton (server-side only, uses STRIPE_SECRET_KEY). Create lib/stripe-client.ts with getStripePromise() for client-side Stripe Elements initialization (uses NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY).

tasks.title: Create Listmonk API client
tasks.description: Create lib/listmonk.ts with sendTransactionalEmail(templateId, email, data) and addSubscriber(email, listId) functions. Uses fetch with Basic Auth (LISTMONK_API_USER:LISTMONK_API_TOKEN). Base URL from LISTMONK_URL env var.

tasks.title: Create shared TypeScript types and constants
tasks.description: Create lib/types.ts with interfaces: Product, Category, JournalPost, LearnArticle, Ingredient, Page, CartItem, Order, Subscription, WishlistItem, Customer, Address, CheckoutRequest, CheckoutResponse. Create lib/constants.ts with SITE_URL, CATEGORIES, SUBSCRIPTION_FREQUENCIES, SHIPPING_METHODS.

groups.name: Design System
groups.description: Brand tokens, global styles, reusable UI components, and page layouts

tasks.title: Create global styles with Tailwind layers and component classes
tasks.description: Create globals.css with Tailwind directives (@tailwind base, components, utilities). Under @layer base, set default body styles, smooth scrolling, font antialiasing. Under @layer components, define: .btn-primary, .btn-secondary, .btn-ghost, .section-container (max-width + padding), .input-field, .product-card, .heading-xl through .heading-sm, .body-lg, .body-sm, .caption. Follow the SecureClear pattern of component classes in globals.css.

tasks.title: Build core UI components (Button, Input, NewsletterForm)
tasks.description: Create components/ui/Button.tsx with variants (primary, secondary, ghost), sizes (sm, md, lg), disabled state, loading state. Create components/ui/Input.tsx with label, error message, and required indicator. Create components/ui/NewsletterForm.tsx with email input and submit button that calls POST /api/newsletter. Create components/ui/SocialShare.tsx with copy-link, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter share buttons.

tasks.title: Build content rendering components
tasks.description: Create components/content/PortableText.tsx that wraps @portabletext/react with custom serializers for Sanity Portable Text blocks (headings, images, links, lists). This component is used by product descriptions, journal posts, learn articles, and CMS pages.

groups.name: Sanity CMS Schemas and Studio
groups.description: Content models for all document types and embedded Sanity Studio

tasks.title: Create Sanity document schemas (Product, Category, Ingredient)
tasks.description: Create sanity/schemas/product.ts with fields matching the shape.md Product model: name, slug, price, description (Portable Text), ingredients (references), usageInstructions (Portable Text), category (reference), images (array of image), subscriptionEligible (boolean), status (string: active/draft), seo (object: metaTitle, metaDescription). Create sanity/schemas/category.ts with name, slug, description, order. Create sanity/schemas/ingredient.ts with name, slug, description (Portable Text), benefits (array of string).

tasks.title: Create Sanity document schemas (Journal, Learn, Page)
tasks.description: Create sanity/schemas/journalPost.ts with title, slug, featuredImage, body (Portable Text), excerpt, category (reference), publishedAt, seo. Create sanity/schemas/journalCategory.ts with name, slug. Create sanity/schemas/learnArticle.ts with title, slug, featuredImage, body, relatedProducts (references), seo. Create sanity/schemas/page.ts with title, slug, body, seo. Create sanity/schemas/index.ts that exports all schemas.

tasks.title: Create GROQ query library
tasks.description: Create sanity/lib/queries.ts with typed GROQ query strings for all fetch operations: allProducts, productsByCategory, productBySlug, allCategories, allJournalPosts (paginated), journalPostBySlug, allLearnArticles, learnArticleBySlug, allIngredients, ingredientBySlug, pageBySlug, featuredProducts, relatedProducts. Each query should select only the fields needed by its corresponding page component.

tasks.title: Embed Sanity Studio at /studio route
tasks.description: Create app/studio/[[...tool]]/page.tsx using next-sanity's Studio component. Configure sanity.config.ts (or sanity/config.ts) with the project schemas and plugins (deskTool, visionTool). The Studio should be accessible at handofya.com/studio and use Sanity's built-in authentication. Update next.config.ts if needed to handle Studio routing.

groups.name: Global Layout
groups.description: Root layout, header, footer, mobile navigation, cart drawer

tasks.title: Build root layout with metadata, fonts, and page shell
tasks.description: Create app/layout.tsx as the root Server Component layout. Include: HTML lang attribute, metadata export (title, description, Open Graph for handofya.com), font loading (self-hosted variable fonts from public/fonts/ or Google Fonts via next/font), body with antialiased class, Header component, main element wrapping children, Footer component. Follow the SecureClear pattern of metadata in the root layout.

tasks.title: Build Header with desktop navigation and mobile trigger
tasks.description: Create components/layout/Header.tsx. Desktop: brand logo (left), horizontal nav links (Shop dropdown with categories, Journal, Learn, About), right side (Account icon, Cart icon with badge showing item count). Mobile: brand logo (left), hamburger menu button (right), cart icon. Shop dropdown on desktop shows category links fetched from Sanity (or hardcoded for MVP: Face, Supplements, Hair Oils, Eye Cremes, Face Masques, Fragrances). Sticky header on scroll. Calm, minimal design per PRD.

tasks.title: Build Footer with links, newsletter, and social icons
tasks.description: Create components/layout/Footer.tsx. Sections: brand logo + tagline, navigation links (Shop, Journal, Learn, About, Contact), policy links (FAQ, Shipping/Returns, Terms, Privacy), newsletter signup form (uses NewsletterForm component), social media icons (Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, YouTube) linking to brand accounts. Copyright line at bottom.

tasks.title: Build MobileNav slide-out drawer
tasks.description: Create components/layout/MobileNav.tsx. Slide-out drawer from the left (or full-screen overlay). Shows: close button, nav links (Shop with expandable category list, Journal, Learn, About, Contact), account link, cart link. Smooth animation (transform + opacity transition). Accessible: focus trap, ESC to close, aria attributes.

tasks.title: Build CartDrawer slide-out component
tasks.description: Create components/layout/CartDrawer.tsx. Slide-out drawer from the right. Shows cart line items (image thumbnail, name, quantity, price, subscription badge), subtotal, 'View Cart' button linking to /cart, 'Checkout' button linking to /checkout. Empty state message when cart is empty. Accessible: focus trap, ESC to close.

groups.name: Product Catalog
groups.description: Product listing pages, category pages, and product detail pages

tasks.title: Build product components (ProductCard, ProductGrid, ProductImages)
tasks.description: Create components/product/ProductCard.tsx: displays product image (Sanity CDN, next/image), product name, price, link to /shop/[slug]. Consistent image aspect ratio. Create components/product/ProductGrid.tsx: responsive grid (1 col mobile, 2 tablet, 3 desktop). Create components/product/ProductImages.tsx: main image with thumbnail gallery, zoom on click/hover.

tasks.title: Build SubscriptionToggle and AddToCart components
tasks.description: Create components/product/SubscriptionToggle.tsx: toggle between one-time and subscription purchase. When subscription selected, show frequency dropdown (Monthly, Every 2 Months, Every 3 Months). Show any savings percentage if applicable. Create components/product/AddToCart.tsx: 'Add to Cart' button that adds item to cart state with subscription metadata if toggled. Shows loading state during add. Opens CartDrawer on success.

tasks.title: Build Shop page (all products) and Category pages
tasks.description: Create app/(shop)/shop/page.tsx as Server Component: fetches all active products from Sanity, renders ProductGrid. Create app/(shop)/shop/[category]/page.tsx as Server Component: fetches products by category slug, renders category name heading + description + ProductGrid. Implement generateStaticParams() for SSG of all 6 categories. Implement generateMetadata() for SEO.

tasks.title: Build Product Detail Page
tasks.description: Create app/(shop)/shop/[slug]/page.tsx as Server Component. Two-column layout on desktop (images left, info right), single column on mobile. Displays: ProductImages gallery, product name, price, SubscriptionToggle (if eligible), AddToCart button, description (PortableText), ingredients list (expandable, linking to /ingredients/[slug]), usage instructions (PortableText), related products grid (3 items from same category). Implement generateStaticParams() for SSG. Implement generateMetadata() with product SEO fields.

groups.name: Shopping Cart
groups.description: Cart state management, cart page, and cart drawer integration

tasks.title: Implement cart state management
tasks.description: Create lib/cart.ts with cart logic. For guests: localStorage-based cart (read/write JSON array of CartItem). For authenticated users: mirror cart to Supabase (optional for MVP, can defer server-side cart sync). Exports: getCart(), addToCart(item), updateQuantity(slug, quantity), removeFromCart(slug), clearCart(), getCartTotal(). Use React context or zustand for in-memory state shared across components. Cart badge count in Header updates reactively.

tasks.title: Build CartLineItem and CartSummary components
tasks.description: Create components/cart/CartLineItem.tsx: product image thumbnail, name, unit price, quantity selector (+ / -), line total, subscription badge with frequency if subscription item, remove button. Create components/cart/CartSummary.tsx: subtotal, estimated shipping (flat rate or free-above-threshold), estimated tax placeholder, order total, 'Proceed to Checkout' button.

tasks.title: Build full Cart page
tasks.description: Create app/(checkout)/cart/page.tsx. Uses the (checkout) route group. Displays CartLineItem for each item, CartSummary on the right (desktop) or below (mobile). Empty cart state with 'Continue Shopping' link to /shop. 'Proceed to Checkout' button links to /checkout.

groups.name: Stripe Checkout and Subscriptions
groups.description: Checkout flow, Stripe integration, webhook handling, order creation

tasks.title: Build checkout API route
tasks.description: Create app/api/checkout/route.ts. POST handler: validate input with Zod (items array, shipping address). If authenticated, get or create Stripe Customer (look up stripe_customer_id in customers table, create if null). Create Stripe Checkout Session: mode 'payment' for one-time items, mode 'subscription' for subscription items. Include line_items, shipping options, automatic_tax, success_url, cancel_url, metadata. Return { sessionId, url }. Handle errors: return appropriate status codes. Install zod.

tasks.title: Build Stripe webhook handler
tasks.description: Create app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts. POST handler: read raw body, verify Stripe signature using STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Handle events: checkout.session.completed (create order in Supabase, send confirmation email via Listmonk, create subscription record if subscription mode), invoice.paid (create renewal order, update subscription next_billing_date), customer.subscription.updated (update subscription status/frequency in Supabase), customer.subscription.deleted (mark subscription cancelled). Export config = { api: { bodyParser: false } } for raw body access.

tasks.title: Build checkout page with Stripe redirect
tasks.description: Create app/(checkout)/checkout/page.tsx. Client component. Uses (checkout) route group with minimal layout (no header nav, no footer, just logo + back-to-cart link). Shipping address form, shipping method selection. On submit: POST /api/checkout, redirect to Stripe Checkout URL. Show loading state during API call. Handle errors with user-facing messages. Create app/(checkout)/layout.tsx with minimal chrome for distraction-free checkout.

tasks.title: Build checkout success page
tasks.description: Create app/(checkout)/checkout/success/page.tsx. Reads session_id from URL params. Fetches order details from Supabase (or Stripe session). Displays order confirmation: order number, line items, total, shipping address, estimated delivery. Clears cart from localStorage. Link to /account/orders for authenticated users, link to /shop for guests. Offer account creation for guest checkouts.

groups.name: Customer Accounts
groups.description: Authentication, account dashboard, order history, subscription management, wishlists

tasks.title: Build auth pages (login, signup, callback)
tasks.description: Create app/(auth)/login/page.tsx: email input, 'Send Magic Link' button, calls supabase.auth.signInWithOtp(). Success state shows 'Check your email'. Create app/(auth)/signup/page.tsx: same flow (Supabase OTP handles both new and existing users). Create app/(auth)/auth/callback/page.tsx: adapted from SecureClear pattern -- listens for onAuthStateChange, creates customer record in Supabase if new (INSERT INTO customers ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING), stores session, redirects to /account.

tasks.title: Build account layout with auth guard
tasks.description: Create app/(account)/layout.tsx: checks Supabase auth session. If not authenticated, redirect to /login. If authenticated, render account shell with sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Orders, Subscriptions, Wishlist, Settings). Mobile: top tabs or hamburger. Pass customer data to children via context or props.

tasks.title: Build account dashboard and settings pages
tasks.description: Create app/(account)/account/page.tsx: welcome message, quick links to orders/subscriptions/wishlist, recent order summary. Create app/(account)/account/settings/page.tsx: name edit, email display (read-only, from Supabase auth), logout button.

tasks.title: Build order history page and API route
tasks.description: Create app/api/orders/route.ts: GET handler, verify auth, query orders table WHERE customer_id = user.id ORDER BY created_at DESC. Return Order[]. Create app/(account)/account/orders/page.tsx: list of orders with date, order number, status badge, total, expandable line items. Create components/account/OrderList.tsx.

tasks.title: Build subscription management page and API routes
tasks.description: Create app/api/subscriptions/route.ts: GET handler returns customer subscriptions (join Supabase data with Stripe subscription details). Create app/api/subscriptions/[id]/route.ts: PATCH handler for update frequency, pause, resume; DELETE handler for cancel. All handlers verify auth and subscription ownership. Create app/(account)/account/subscriptions/page.tsx: list of active/paused/cancelled subscriptions. Create components/account/SubscriptionCard.tsx: shows product, frequency, next billing date, status, action buttons (change frequency, pause, resume, cancel).

tasks.title: Build wishlist page and API routes
tasks.description: Create app/api/wishlist/route.ts: GET handler returns wishlist items (product slugs), POST handler adds item. Create app/api/wishlist/[slug]/route.ts: DELETE handler removes item. All verify auth. Create app/(account)/account/wishlist/page.tsx: grid of wishlisted products (fetch product details from Sanity by slug). Create components/account/WishlistGrid.tsx. Add wishlist heart icon to ProductCard (toggle on click, calls POST or DELETE /api/wishlist).

groups.name: Content Pages
groups.description: Journal, Learn, Ingredients, About, Contact, FAQ, policy pages

tasks.title: Build Journal listing and post pages
tasks.description: Create app/(content)/journal/page.tsx: Server Component, fetches journal posts from Sanity (paginated, reverse chronological). Featured post at top (large image), grid of recent posts below. Create app/(content)/journal/[slug]/page.tsx: individual post with editorial layout, generous margins, featured image, body (PortableText), author/date, social sharing buttons, related posts at bottom. Create components/content/JournalCard.tsx. Implement generateStaticParams() and generateMetadata().

tasks.title: Build Learn hub and article pages
tasks.description: Create app/(content)/learn/page.tsx: Server Component, fetches learn articles from Sanity. Grid of articles with featured images. Create app/(content)/learn/[slug]/page.tsx: article with body (PortableText), related products section at bottom linking to product pages. Implement generateStaticParams() and generateMetadata().

tasks.title: Build Ingredient database pages
tasks.description: Create app/(content)/ingredients/page.tsx: Server Component, fetches all ingredients from Sanity. Alphabetical listing or grouped display. Client-side search/filter (text input filters the list). Create app/(content)/ingredients/[slug]/page.tsx: ingredient detail with name, description (PortableText), benefits list, and 'Products containing this ingredient' section (reverse lookup via GROQ: products where ingredients array contains this ingredient). Create components/content/IngredientList.tsx.

tasks.title: Build informational pages and API routes (About, Contact, FAQ, policies)
tasks.description: Create app/(content)/about/page.tsx: fetches 'about' page from Sanity, renders PortableText. Create app/(content)/contact/page.tsx: contact form (name, email, message) + brand info. Create app/api/contact/route.ts: validates with Zod, sends email via Listmonk transactional API (or direct SMTP). Rate-limited. Create app/(content)/faq/page.tsx: fetches FAQ page from Sanity (or structured FAQ entries). Create app/(content)/shipping-returns/page.tsx, terms/page.tsx, privacy/page.tsx: all fetch from Sanity page type. Create app/api/newsletter/route.ts: POST handler, calls Listmonk addSubscriber().

groups.name: Homepage
groups.description: Homepage with hero, featured products, journal preview, brand story, newsletter

tasks.title: Build Homepage
tasks.description: Create app/page.tsx as Server Component. Sections: (1) Hero -- single striking product/lifestyle image, minimal text, CTA button to /shop. No carousel. Static, confident composition. (2) Featured Products -- curated grid of 3 products fetched from Sanity (featured flag or manual selection). (3) Journal Preview -- 1-2 recent journal posts with editorial imagery. (4) Brand Story Teaser -- single paragraph with link to /about. (5) Newsletter Signup -- minimal form using NewsletterForm component. Design must follow PRD section 8: visual stillness, one focal point per viewport, generous whitespace.

groups.name: SEO
groups.description: Structured data, sitemap, robots.txt, meta tags, Open Graph

tasks.title: Implement SEO: sitemap, robots.txt, structured data
tasks.description: Create app/sitemap.ts: dynamic sitemap fetching all product slugs, journal post slugs, learn article slugs, ingredient slugs, and static pages from Sanity. Create app/robots.ts: allow all crawlers, reference sitemap URL, disallow /studio and /api. Add JSON-LD structured data to product pages (Product + Offer schema), journal posts (Article schema), and all pages (BreadcrumbList schema). Verify all pages have unique generateMetadata() with title, description, and Open Graph tags. Add canonical URL to all pages.
tasks.verification: cd projects/handofya/web && npm run build && curl http://localhost:3000/sitemap.xml | head -20

groups.name: Sanity Revalidation Webhook
groups.description: On-demand ISR revalidation triggered by Sanity content changes

tasks.title: Build Sanity revalidation webhook API route
tasks.description: Create app/api/revalidate/route.ts: POST handler that receives Sanity webhook payloads when content is published/updated/deleted. Verify webhook secret (SANITY_WEBHOOK_SECRET header). Based on document type, call revalidateTag() or revalidatePath() to invalidate ISR cache for affected pages. Product changes revalidate /shop, /shop/[category], /shop/[slug]. Journal changes revalidate /journal, /journal/[slug]. Ingredient changes revalidate /ingredients. Return { revalidated: true, paths: [...] }.

groups.name: Performance Optimization
groups.description: Image optimization, lazy loading, bundle analysis, Lighthouse targets

tasks.title: Performance optimization pass
tasks.description: Audit and optimize: (1) Images -- verify all product images use next/image with Sanity CDN, responsive srcset, WebP/AVIF format, lazy loading below the fold, explicit width/height to prevent CLS. (2) Fonts -- ensure variable fonts are loaded with font-display: swap and preloaded. (3) Bundle -- analyze with @next/bundle-analyzer, verify no unnecessary client-side JavaScript on Server Component pages. (4) Third-party scripts -- defer analytics, load Stripe.js only on checkout page. (5) Caching -- verify ISR revalidation times are appropriate (products: 3600s, journal: 3600s, pages: 86400s). Target: Lighthouse 90+ mobile, LCP < 2.5s, CLS < 0.1.

tasks.title: Set up Playwright and write E2E test suite
tasks.description: Create playwright.config.ts with base URL, browser config (Chromium, Firefox, WebKit), and screenshot settings. Write test files: tests/layout.spec.ts (header renders, nav links work, footer renders, mobile nav opens), tests/product.spec.ts (product grid renders, product detail page loads, subscription toggle works), tests/cart.spec.ts (add to cart, update quantity, remove item, cart persists on reload), tests/checkout.spec.ts (checkout form renders, validation works; mock Stripe for submission), tests/account.spec.ts (login page renders, auth callback redirects; mock Supabase auth), tests/content.spec.ts (journal listing renders, journal post loads, ingredient search works, contact form submits). Use page.route() for API mocking consistent with SecureClear pattern.

groups.name: Deployment Configuration
groups.description: Vercel setup, environment variables, DNS, Listmonk on Render

tasks.title: Configure Vercel deployment and Listmonk on Render
tasks.description: Create Vercel project linked to the repository. Configure: root directory as projects/handofya/web, build command: npm run build, output directory: .next, Node.js 20.x. Set all environment variables (Supabase, Sanity, Stripe, Listmonk). Configure custom domain: handofya.com. Set up Listmonk Docker container on Render: Dockerfile or Render blueprint, PostgreSQL database for Listmonk, SMTP relay configuration (SES or Postmark), configure SPF/DKIM/DMARC DNS records for handofya.com. Register Stripe webhook endpoint: https://handofya.com/api/webhooks/stripe. Configure Sanity webhook: POST to https://handofya.com/api/revalidate on document publish.
